creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
No, I don't use the port at all.

The closest I can offer is that I have my own cross-compiler port based on GCC.  It's not stock.  I actually offered Android support for Ada about 2 years before it was on GCC, but there are still a few custom patches.

lang/gnatdroid-armv7


Anyway, this was more of a "heads up" PR.  I'm glad you are updating the port, but I would have been fine if you said, "thanks for letting me know" and closed the PR. :)


Anyway -- stock GCC sounds good to me if it works.
